name: O-11 bootstrap eval scenarios: --trace-tmpdirs records that each scenario runs in an isolated tmpdir
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --trace-tmpdirs --emit-report "$PWD/report.json" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -s report.json ] && grep -q 'tmpdir' err.txt && echo isolated 1>&2
